query:
INSERT INTO payment_intents (
            virtual_key_id, 
            partner_name, 
            path, 
            request_hash, 
            amount, 
            currency, 
            facilitator_url, 
            recipient, 
            provider
        ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
        RETURNING id
